name: aurora-thinking
title: Aurora Thinking
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Reasoning and chain-of-thought disclosure block. Three variants: thinking (streaming text), cot (numbered steps with connector), plan (step list with status icons).
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora Thinking.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/thinking.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-components`.
